overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a character with red hair walking through a snowy, misty landscape toward a gothic castle complex. The character passes through an ornate iron gate and continues along a snow-covered path, eventually passing another pedestrian. The atmosphere is cold and moody with blue-toned lighting typical of winter dusk.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered estate road bordered by stone walls and rocky terrain. Vintage lamp posts line the right side while bare winter trees stand on the left, with a distant castle spire visible through the mist ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate estate gateway with iron portcullis

massive stone pillars supporting the gate, topped with decorative urns
massive stone pillars supporting the gate, topped with decorative urns

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through an ornate iron gate flanked by massive stone pillars. The gate structure creates a brief enclosed feeling as the character transitions from the outer approach to the inner estate grounds, with the castle spires growing larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: estate grounds with panoramic castle view

low stone walls lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Beyond the gate, the path opens into estate grounds with a panoramic view of the castle complex ahead. The character passes another pedestrian walking in the opposite direction, while snow-covered trees frame the approach to the distant gothic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wintry estate road that gradually opens into a panoramic view of a gothic castle complex. It begins by trailing a red-haired character walking past vintage lamp posts and bare winter trees, with a distant spire barely visible through the thick mist. As the character advances, the scene narrows as they pass through an ornate iron gate flanked by massive stone pillars, creating a brief sense of enclosure. The view then expands beyond the gate into the inner estate grounds, where the castle spires grow larger and more imposing against the cold sky. Finally, the camera follows the character past another pedestrian walking in the opposite direction, framed by snow-covered trees leading toward the distant architecture.
